title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zoho Corporation Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zoho Corporation Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zoho Corporation Holdings Services:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation Holdings Services!
